path: 01 Journal/2026/2026-01 January/Resources/2026-01-07 Sharing files with Externals - Security Agreement.pdf
text: Sharing files with Externals (Security Agreement) By confirming this agreement, you will be able to share files with external parties via OneDrive or SharePoint Online. In addition, you will be assigned a training that you must complete before sharing files with external parties via these platforms. You also confirm that you will comply with the following conditions: • You will complete the training course assigned to you before sharing files. • You will regularly check whether the permissions assigned are still appropriate and remove any unused access rights. • You will ensure that you apply the standards from the training course in order to guarantee secure exchange with external parties. • You will apply the information classification in accordance with the HARTING guideline (HARTING Information Classification Guideline). • You give us the permission to send monthly E-Mail reminders to you to check the sharing permissions. User: Sebastian Eicke HARTING company (area/department): HARTING Stiftung & Co. KG (Normung) The user agreed to the terms on Jan. 7, 2026, 2:25 p.m. (UTC).
